decision.summary: Keep both current positions unchanged and do not open a new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The April 10 74k daily Yes is effectively a near-settled loser, but early-stage rules disable stop-loss and favor letting positions resolve naturally; the weekly April 6-12 74k Yes remains live and far below take-profit. The latest 2026-04-10 Beecthor transcript still allows a short-term push into roughly 73.3k-74.1k before looking for shorts, and Binance at 72717.81 keeps that path plausible. Even though the nearest new daily upside market for April 11 is 73k Yes at 75.05% and aligns with the thesis, the account is already at its current open-position limit, so no new entry should be added.
